closed_world.value: Mill with locking doors that trap the protagonist inside
closed_world.quote: The last thing I remember was walking in here and the doors locking

resolution.value: Investigation team finds protagonist through metal analysis matching evidence from turtle
resolution.quote: the swab they had taken from the turtle when I first gave it to them matched from the metal here

investigator.value: Alexandra, a detective on her first case working with partners Garry and Jim
investigator.quote: Man my first case and I scare both, Garry, my brother and, Jim, my boyfriend

red_herring.value: Supernatural elements (ghosts, shadow) used to obscure the real explanation of events at the mill
red_herring.quote: I knew better than to reply ghosts so I played amnesia

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence linking crime scene to victim - metal swab from turtle matches mill location
clue_fairness.quote: the swab they had taken from the turtle when I first gave it to them matched from the metal here

social_world.value: Professional investigative team structure with personal relationships affecting the case dynamics
social_world.quote: Man my first case and I scare both, Garry, my brother and, Jim, my boyfriend

alibi.value: Protagonist conceals true events by feigning amnesia about supernatural encounter
alibi.quote: I don't know. Why are you here? The last thing I remember was walking in here and the doors locking

reveal_mechanic.value: Forensic matching of physical evidence from victim's possession to crime scene location
reveal_mechanic.quote: the swab they had taken from the turtle when I first gave it to them matched from the metal here

investigator_wound.value: First case anxiety and fear of appearing incompetent, complicated by supernatural encounter
investigator_wound.quote: Man my first case and I scare both, Garry, my brother and, Jim, my boyfriend

_meta.title: ebook c keelemen the fall from darkness
